emails.subject: message
emails.body: Did you get the message last night that the banks pulled it out for us?

emails.subject: RE: message
emails.body: RE: message yes i did, from what you mentioned it seemed as if we are a potential take over targe. To: Mckay, Brad

emails.subject: RE: message
emails.body: That's still true I was getting worried about Chapter X filings. A friend in b-school worked at Arco when BP bought them she got a 1-yr package. Where do I sign up? To: Thames, Davis

emails.subject: RE: message
emails.body: those boys have wads of cash on hand, i am sure they will pay you handsomely regardless of your decision To: Mckay, Brad
